name: @hackclub/icons
description: Hack Club’s iconset, a superset of spectrum-icons
author: Lachlan Campbell <lachlan@hackclub.com>

scripts.build: bun run prepare && bun run docs:build
scripts.build:cjs: bun build src/index.tsx --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --external react --external prop-types --production
scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.tsx --outdir dist/esm --target browser --format esm --external react --external prop-types --production && echo '{"type":"module"}' > dist/esm/package.json
scripts.prepare: rm -rf dist && bun run build:types && bun run build:cjs && bun run build:esm
